features: These attractive Decorative Hand Fans are both stylish and practical.
description: Decorative Hand Fan - 1 These attractive Decorative Hand Fans are both stylish and practical. The paper fan symbolizes friendship, respect and good wishes, hence their increasing popularity at weddings and birthday celebrations. They are traditionally given on special occasions so why not decorate your wedding venue with Chinese paper fans and let your guests take them home as a memento of your special day. Each fan features a sturdy bamboo construction with a paper fanning section. Each fan is complete with an on-trend summer themed printed design on the front. These fans are foldable, lightweight, compact and easy carry in your handbags. These fans are handy and useful on hot summer days to fan yourself and keep yourself cool and feeling fresh.
